sourceMovie.title: Revenge of the Nerds
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Revenge of the Nerds works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: Ghostbusters
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Revenge of the Nerds clicked for you, Ghostbusters (1984) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Revenge of the Nerds?
faq.answer: Try Ghostbusters, Bridget Jones's Diary, Harold & Kumar Go to White Castle—each shares DNA with Revenge of the Nerds while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Revenge of the Nerds?
faq.answer: Revenge of the Nerds (1984) is best described as Comedy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Revenge of the Nerds part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Revenge of the Nerds Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
